summary: Planning is complete for GitHub issue #6. The plan adds safe recursive .kontour event/projection discovery to the console foundation, preserves fixture inspection, adds a local inspector command/docs, and verifies LocalFileSink-to-discovery tests plus forbidden API scan.
next_steps: Implement Wave 1 in src/console-foundation/index.js, bin/kontour-console-inspect.js, and README.md.
Implement Wave 2 tests that write through LocalFileSink and read through the new local discovery path.
Run npm test, npm run inspect:fixtures, targeted local discovery smoke, and the forbidden API scan.
warnings: Keep inspectFixtures() and npm run inspect:fixtures behavior stable for checked-in docs examples.
Recursive local discovery must not follow symlink escapes and must keep source labels or relative paths unambiguous.
Action descriptors, URLs, endpoints, and commands remain inert data only.
